sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27589" key="difqeropw/lhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διφθεροπώλης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n27589.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leather-seller,</tr_> Nicoph.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
